title: Prisma Cloud - Find AWS Resource by FQDN v2
content:
Find AWS resources by FQDN using Prisma Cloud inventory.
Supported services: EC2, Application Load Balancer, ECS, Route53, CloudFront, S3, API Gateway.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — FQDN: FQDN to look up.; AWSDomains: Comma-separated list of AWS domains..

Outputs — PrismaCloud.Attribution: Prisma Cloud attributed asset information..

Integrations/scripts used: PrismaCloud v2, PrismaCloudAttribution, SetAndHandleEmpty.
raw_yaml:
description: |
  Find AWS resources by FQDN using Prisma Cloud inventory.
  Supported services: EC2, Application Load Balancer, ECS, Route53, CloudFront, S3, API Gateway.
id: Prisma Cloud - Find AWS Resource by FQDN v2
inputs:
- description: FQDN to look up.
  key: FQDN
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: true
  value: {}
- description: Comma-separated list of AWS domains.
  key: AWSDomains
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: false
  value:
    simple: .amazonaws.com,.cloudfront.net
name: Prisma Cloud - Find AWS Resource by FQDN v2
outputs:
- contextPath: PrismaCloud.Attribution
  description: Prisma Cloud attributed asset information.
  type: unknown

                  simple: .
            operator: concat
          - args:
              separator:
                value:
                  simple: ' OR '
            operator: join
          - args:
              prefix:
                value:
                  simple: 'config from cloud.resource where cloud.type = ''aws'' AND cloud.service = ''Amazon Route53'' AND api.name = ''aws-route53-list-hosted-zones'' AND json.rule = ( '

                  simple: ' )'
            operator: concat
